sentence: וְהָאָרֶץ הָיְתָה תֹהוּ וָבֹהוּ וְחֹשֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵי תְהוֹם וְרוּחַ אֱלֹהִים מְרַחֶפֶת עַל־פְּנֵי הַמָּיִם

grammatical-notes.וְהָאָרֶץ: Disjunctive waw signaling a transition to the state of the earth.
grammatical-notes.הָיְתָה: Stative perfect aspect: 'was existing in a condition'.
grammatical-notes.וְרוּחַ: The active breath or wind of the Deity.
grammatical-notes.מְרַחֶפֶת: Piel Participle: intense, continuous hovering/fluttering movement.

dictionary-meaning.וְהָאָרֶץ: Now the material foundation of the physical world — disclosing the circumstantial state of the substrate created in Unit 1.
dictionary-meaning.תֹהוּ וָבֹהוּ: A structureless and empty wasteland — disclosing the functional non-existence and lack of order at the start.
dictionary-meaning.תְהוֹם: The roaring deep — disclosing the root 'hum' (to roar) and avoiding the loanword 'abyss'.
dictionary-meaning.וְרוּחַ: The active Breath of Elohim — disclosing the physical 'ruach' (breath/wind) as the active divine presence.
dictionary-meaning.מְרַחֶפֶת: Energetically hovering — disclosing the intense Piel Participle and the eagle metaphor of fluttering/brooding.

רוּחַ.reason: Captures the physical potency of the divine presence without the modern religious baggage of 'spirit'.

main-translation: ***Now the material foundation of the physical world was a structureless and empty wasteland***; ***an absolute absence of light was over the surface of the roaring deep***, ***while the active Breath of Elohim was energetically hovering over the face of the waters.***

main-translation-explanation.Now the material foundation: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Resolved that 'Now' is the best disjunctive marker. Removed 'solid' per Unit 1 trial.
main-translation-explanation.was a structureless and empty wasteland: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Rejected 'was existing in a state of being' as robotic. Chose 'was a structureless and empty wasteland' to disclose the Tohu-wa-Bohu state with material clarity.
main-translation-explanation.absolute absence of light was over the s: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Rejected 'abyss' as a Greek loanword. Chose 'roaring deep' to capture the root 'hum'. Removed 'shrouded' as too poetic; used 'was over'.
main-translation-explanation.active Breath of Elohim was energeticall: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Rejected 'vibrated with energy' as weird/modern. Chose 'active Breath' and 'energetically hovering' to disclose the Piel intensity and the Ruach-metaphor with forensic precision.

rejected-translations.reason: Modern religious baggage; fails to disclose the physical 'breath' metaphor of the author.
